---
title: blank-imports
description: "Require blank imports to be justified."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Require blank imports to be justified. Strider default: main and test packages exempt.

## Bad

```go
import _ "example.com/driver"
```

## Good

```go
import _ "example.com/driver" // register the driver
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only blank-imports`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
